title: The Day
subtitle: Everything you need to know about our wedding day, from start to finish.
footerNote: Times are approximate. We'll send final details closer to the date.

bus.title: Bus to Venue
bus.description: A bus will depart from Fuente Murrieta in Logroño to take guests to the venue. Please arrive a few minutes early so we can leave on time.

ceremony.title: Ceremony
ceremony.description: Join us as we exchange our vows at the beautiful Finca del Hotel San Camilo in Navarrete.

cocktails.title: Cocktail Hour
cocktails.description: Celebrate with us on the terrace with drinks and pintxos while we take photos with family and friends.

lunch.title: Lunch
lunch.description: Enjoy a wedding lunch with us at Hotel San Camilo.

dancing.title: DJ & Dancing
dancing.description: Dance the night away with our DJ at Hotel San Camilo.

busReturn.title: Early Bus Return
busReturn.description: A bus will depart from Hotel San Camilo back to Fuente Murrieta in Logroño for those who need a ride back.

busReturnLate.title: Late Bus Return
busReturnLate.description: A second, later bus will depart from Hotel San Camilo back to Fuente Murrieta in Logroño for those who want to stay a bit longer.

afterparty.title: After Party
afterparty.description: The night doesn't have to end! Join us in Logroño city centre to keep the celebration going.
